---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Nuclei
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

Describe the problem or limitation you are experiencing. Focus on the problem, not a specific solution.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you would like to see. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or references that might help.
